pages.text: Consuming this cake increases the damage of the next attack based on the consumer's luck value. The damage calculation formula is: Luck Value + 0.2%% Attack Damage.$(br2)$(br)Try using Cherry Clusters on a fox—maybe something good will happen~

pages.title: Cherry Blossom Cake
pages.text: A power beyond the event horizon, $(#FF91E2)said to be a blessing from the Kitsune God$()
